---
title: "Pmetrics Report"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
params:
  res_path: NULL
  pkg_path: ""
  report_filename: "report.pdf"
  outeq:
    value: []
  block:
    value: []
  pred_type: "post"
  icen: "median"
  cycle_mode: "neg2ll"
  cycle_gamlam_label: "Gamma"
  cycle_ic_label: "AIC"
  parameter: NULL
  include_summary: true
  include_obs_pred: true
  include_metrics: true
  include_residuals: true
  include_parameters: true
  include_cycle: true
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# When the package is loaded via pkgload::load_all() in the calling session
# (development mode) it is not installed, so library() would fail in this
# fresh Quarto subprocess.  Use load_all() from the source path when provided.
pkg_path <- params$pkg_path
if (!is.null(pkg_path) && nchar(pkg_path) > 0) {
  pkgload::load_all(pkg_path, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  library(PmetricsReports)
}

res <- readRDS(params$res_path)
outeq <- params$outeq
block <- params$block
pred_type <- params$pred_type
icen <- params$icen
cycle_mode <- params$cycle_mode
cycle_gamlam_label <- params$cycle_gamlam_label
cycle_ic_label <- params$cycle_ic_label
parameter <- params$parameter
include_summary <- isTRUE(params$include_summary)
include_obs_pred <- isTRUE(params$include_obs_pred)
include_metrics <- isTRUE(params$include_metrics)
include_residuals <- isTRUE(params$include_residuals)
include_parameters <- isTRUE(params$include_parameters)
include_cycle <- isTRUE(params$include_cycle)
report_filename <- if (!is.null(params$report_filename) && nzchar(params$report_filename)) {
  as.character(params$report_filename)
} else {
  "report.pdf"
}

opts <- Pmetrics::getPMoptions()
date_format <- opts$date_format
if (is.null(date_format) || !nzchar(date_format)) {
  date_format <- "%m/%d/%y"
}
reported_date <- format(Sys.time(), date_format)
reported_time <- format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M")

latex_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("\\\\", "\\\\textbackslash{}", x)
  x <- gsub("([#$%&_{}])", "\\\\\\1", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("~", "\\\\textasciitilde{}", x)
  x <- gsub("\\^", "\\\\textasciicircum{}", x)
  x
}

report_filename_latex <- latex_escape(report_filename)

kbl <- function(x, digits = NULL, row.names = FALSE) {
  fmt <- if (knitr::is_latex_output()) "latex" else "pipe"
  x_df <- as.data.frame(x)

  args <- list(
    x = x_df,
    format = fmt,
    booktabs = knitr::is_latex_output(),
    row.names = row.names
  )

  if (!is.null(digits) && length(digits) >= 1) {
    args$digits <- digits
  } else {
    num_idx <- vapply(x_df, is.numeric, logical(1))
    if (any(num_idx)) {
      args$digits <- 3
    }
  }

  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    args$longtable <- nrow(x_df) > 24
  }

  out <- do.call(knitr::kable, args)

  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    out <- paste0(
      "\\begingroup\\setlength{\\tabcolsep}{4pt}\\renewcommand{\\arraystretch}{0.92}\\small\n",
      out,
      "\n\\endgroup"
    )
  }

  out
}
```

```{r}
#| results: asis

cat(
  "\\pagestyle{fancy}\n",
  "\\fancyhf{}\n",
  "\\fancyfoot[C]{\\thepage/\\pageref{LastPage}}\n",
  "\\fancyfoot[R]{\\texttt{", report_filename_latex, "}}\n",
  "\\renewcommand{\\headrulewidth}{0pt}\n",
  "\\renewcommand{\\footrulewidth}{0pt}\n",
  sep = ""
)

cat("\\noindent\\textbf{Reported on ", reported_date, " at ", reported_time, "}\\par\\medskip\n\n", sep = "")

if (include_summary) {
  cat("\n\n# Summary\n\n")
  summary_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::summary_table(res)
  cat(kbl(summary_tbl), "\n\n", sep = "")
}

if (include_obs_pred) {
  cat("\n\n# Observed vs Predicted {-}\n\n")

  all_outeq <- PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res)
  selected_outeq <- if (length(outeq)) intersect(all_outeq, as.integer(outeq)) else all_outeq

  if (!length(selected_outeq)) {
    cat("No output equations available for observed vs predicted plots.\n\n")
  } else {
    old_h <- knitr::opts_current$get("fig.height")
    old_w <- knitr::opts_current$get("fig.width")
    knitr::opts_current$set(fig.height = 2.6, fig.width = 6.8)
    on.exit(knitr::opts_current$set(fig.height = old_h, fig.width = old_w), add = TRUE)

    for (oq in selected_outeq) {
      if (oq != selected_outeq[[1]]) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n## Outeq ", oq, "\n\n", sep = "")

      cat("\n\n### Population Prediction\n\n")
      print(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "pop",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = FALSE
      ))

      cat("\n\n### Posterior Prediction\n\n")
      print(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "post",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = FALSE
      ))
      cat("\n")
    }
  }
}

if (include_metrics) {
  cat("\n\n## Prediction Metrics\n\n")
  metrics_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::prediction_metrics_display_table(
    res = res,
    icen = icen,
    pred_type = pred_type,
    outeq = if (length(outeq)) as.integer(outeq) else PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res),
    block = block
  )

  if (nrow(metrics_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(metrics_tbl, digits = 3, row.names = FALSE), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No prediction metrics available for the current selection.\n\n")
  }
}

if (include_residuals) {
  cat("\n\n## Residuals by Time\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
    res = res,
    icen = icen,
    pred_type = pred_type,
    outeq = if (length(outeq)) as.integer(outeq) else PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res),
    block = block,
    resid = TRUE
  ))

  cat("\n\n## Residuals by Concentration\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_residual_conc_plot(
    res = res,
    icen = icen,
    pred_type = pred_type,
    outeq = if (length(outeq)) as.integer(outeq) else PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res),
    block = block
  ))
}

if (include_parameters) {
  cat("\n\n# Parameters\n\n")

  cat("\n\n## Summaries\n\n")
  summary_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::parameter_summary_table(res)
  if (nrow(summary_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(summary_tbl, digits = 3), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No parameter summary data available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Support Points\n\n")
  support_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::support_points_table(res)
  if (nrow(support_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(support_tbl, digits = 3), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No support points available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Covariances\n\n")
  cov_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::covariance_matrix_table(res)
  if (nrow(cov_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cov_tbl, digits = 4), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No covariance matrix available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Correlations\n\n")
  cor_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::correlation_matrix_table(res)
  if (nrow(cor_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cor_tbl, digits = 4), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No correlation matrix available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Marginal Distributions\n\n")
  param_names <- PmetricsReports:::available_parameters(res)
  for (param in param_names) {
    cat("\n\n### ", param, "\n\n", sep = "")
    print(PmetricsReports:::build_final_plot(res, param))
    cat("\n")
  }
}

if (include_cycle) {
  cat("\n\n# Cycle Info\n\n")

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: -2*LL\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = "neg2ll", gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: ", cycle_ic_label, "\n\n", sep = "")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = tolower(cycle_ic_label), gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: ", cycle_gamlam_label, "\n\n", sep = "")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = "gamlam", gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: Normalized Mean\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = "norm_mean", gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: Normalized Median\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = "norm_median", gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Function by Cycle: Normalized SD\n\n")
  print(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(res, metric = "norm_sd", gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label))

  cat("\n\n## Objective Values Table\n\n")
  cycle_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::cycle_objective_table(res)
  if (nrow(cycle_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cycle_tbl, digits = 4), "\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No cycle objective data available.\n")
  }
}
```
